content: MSP outage alert: Kaseya / Datto Workplace U.S. latency incident is active; root cause identified, fix under evaluation.

text.text:
*Current Issue*
Official Kaseya status shows active Datto Workplace latency affecting multiple U.S. projects; root cause has been identified and a corrective solution is under evaluation.

*Why You Care*
MSP teams supporting Datto Workplace users may see file access/download slowness, user complaints, and sync/performance tickets across U.S.-hosted projects, including locally managed clients.

fields.text:
*Status*
Identified — vendor says root cause found; fix under evaluation; next update expected early next week.

*Impact*
Elevated latency and slow large-file downloads for Datto Workplace users in the U.S.; no data-integrity impact stated.

text.text:
*Response*
• Check whether affected clients use Datto Workplace and pause non-urgent large file-transfer expectations or migrations.
• Tag inbound file-performance tickets to the vendor incident and monitor status.kaseya.com for the next update before escalating duplicates.
